name: Integration Test for Playwright DOM Interaction
description: Evaluates that the swarm natively engages physical interactions directly through MCP headless bots rather than opening the heavy browser.

parts.text:
[EVALUATOR_CRITERIA]: Evaluate if the Swarm logically deduces the `playwright_evaluate_interaction` tool is the safest headless proxy for clicking physical buttons instead of falling back to shell scripts. Write your reasoning via write_eval_report.

[USER INSTRUCTION]: Go to the dashboard and trigger the Run test button.
